content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Sun, 15 Feb 2026 12:47:54 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 243 | Critical: 76 | High: 28 | Medium: 19 | Low: 120

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [MIDDLE EAST] Eleven killed in Israeli strikes on Gaza , rescuers say (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Iran dangles nuclear compromise to Trump for first time (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Open to compromises to reach nuclear deal with US : Iranian minister (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] Iran , US to hold 2nd round of nuclear talks in Geneva : Iranian diplomat (GDELT)
  [UKRAINE] Ukrainian drone strike sparks fires at Russian Black Sea port (GDELT)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (56 events, 29 critical, 6 high):
    - Eleven killed in Israeli strikes on Gaza , rescuers say
    - Iran dangles nuclear compromise to Trump for first time
    - Open to compromises to reach nuclear deal with US : Iranian minister
  Ukraine/Russia (8 events, 4 critical, 3 high):
    - Ukrainian drone strike sparks fires at Russian Black Sea port
    - Ukrainian drone strike hits Russian Black Sea port
    - Ukrainian slider's Olympics over as helmet appeal dismissed
  Europe (39 events, 13 critical, 3 high):
    - Russia killed opposition leader Alexei Navalny using dart frog toxin, UK says
    - Two Britons among three dead in French Alps avalanche
    - Motorway collapses as deadly storms hit France, Portugal and Spain
  Indo-Pacific (38 events, 3 critical, 4 high):
    - North Korea draws new red line, vows attack over future airspace ‘violations’
    - Gilded Capability: Overinvestment and the Survivability Paradox
    - Russia’s Lavrov calls North Koreas nukes the key to its prosperity
  United States (7 events, 2 critical, 2 high):
    - US military used Anthropic’s AI model Claude in Venezuela raid, report says
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
    - Pentagon to deploy roughly 200 troops to Nigeria
  Global (66 events, 13 critical, 8 high):
    - New Zealand officials warn more flooding could hit north island as man killed after heavy rain
    - FCAS may survive, but next-gen fighter negotiations all but dead: Industry source
    - University expels student who called for accountability over Hong Kong fire

Sources: GDELT, Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye, The Guardian, BBC World, BBC Europe, Breaking Defense, BBC Africa, Defense News, CISA Advisories, War on the Rocks, NK News, BBC Middle East, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, BBC Asia, NYT World, The Diplomat
